title: ardisia tawaensis
intro: Ardisia tawaensis is a species of flowering plant in the family Myrsinaceae, native to New Zealand. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include antiseptic, anti-inflammatory, and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Ardisia tawaensis include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs. Ardisia tawaensis can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional Maori medicine to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health conditions.
